new_claims.claim_text: Automated sheep shearing video exemplifies advanced Japanese technology.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran has attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for Trump and Israel coordinating an attack against Iran’s energy infrastructure.

new_claims.claim_text: US and Israel bombed petrochemical facilities in Iran.

new_claims.claim_text: Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
